zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Norton於1632年1月13日在英國貝德福爾迪恩受洗時，她的父親Thomas Norton23歲，母親Grace Wells24歲。她於1651年4月2日與Lieut. William Seward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1704年在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Norton于1632年1月13日在英国貝德福爾迪恩受洗时，她的父亲Thomas Norton23岁，母亲Grace Wells24岁。她于1651年4月2日与Lieut. William Seward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1704年在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Norton was christened on 13 January 1632, in Dean, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Norton, was 23 and her mother, Grace Wells, was 24. She married Lieut. William Seward on 2 April 1651, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1704, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Norton a été baptisée le 13 janvier 1632, à Dean, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Norton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Grace Wells, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Lieut. William Seward le 2 avril 1651, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1704, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Norton am 13. Januar 1632 in Dean, Bedfordshire, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Norton 23 und ihre Mutter Grace Wells 24. Sie hat am 2. April 1651 in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Lieut. William Seward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1704 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Norton è stato battezzato il 13 gennaio 1632 nel Dean, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Norton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Grace Wells, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Lieut. William Seward il 2 aprile 1651, nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1704, nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Nortonが1632年1月13日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアディーンで洗礼を受けた時，父Thomas Nortonは23歳，母Grace Wellsは24歳であった。1651年4月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードでLieut. William Sewardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1704年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Norton(이)가 1632년 1월 13일 영국 베드퍼드실르 디에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Norton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Wells(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1651년 4월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 Lieut. William Seward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1704년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Norton foi batizada em 13 de janeiro de 1632, em Dean, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Norton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Grace Wells, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Lieut. William Seward em 2 de abril de 1651, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1704, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Norton была крещена 13 января 1632 г. в местности дин, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Norton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Wells, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lieut. William Seward 2 апреля 1651 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1704 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Norton se bautizó el 13 de enero de 1632, en Dean, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Norton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Grace Wells, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lieut. William Seward el 2 de abril de 1651, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1704, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años.
